title: Fix NUXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE env variable and nginx proxy for migration status
description:
Problem: GET https://m.wifiobd.ru/api/v1/admin/migration/status returns DNS error in browser. Root cause analysis:

1. In .env.example: NUXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE=http://localhost:8000 (NO /api/v1 suffix)
2. In nuxt.config.ts: the fallback value is 'http://localhost:8000/api/v1' WITH /api/v1 suffix
3. In frontend/composables/useApi.ts (or similar): apiBase from runtimeConfig is used as prefix for all API calls
4. The deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml uses env_file: /srv/site-builder/.env.prod for the frontend service — so NUXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE is read from .env.prod on the server, NOT hardcoded in compose
5. If the admin set NUXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE=https://m.wifiobd.ru in .env.prod (without /api/v1), all requests go to https://m.wifiobd.ru/blog/posts which nginx cannot proxy to backend (nginx only proxies /api/ prefix)

Actions required:
1. Fix .env.example line 105: change NUXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE=http://localhost:8000 to NUXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE=http://localhost:8000/api/v1 (add /api/v1 suffix to match the nuxt.config.ts fallback pattern)
2. Add a comment above NUXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE in .env.example: '# REQUIRED: must include /api/v1 suffix. Production example: https://m.wifiobd.ru/api/v1'
3. Verify nginx.conf location /api/ block — currently looks correct (proxies to backend:8000), no changes needed
4. DO NOT modify docker-compose.prod.yml — frontend reads NUXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE from env_file /srv/site-builder/.env.prod on the server

Note for user (add to report): The .env.prod on the production server must have NUXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE=https://m.wifiobd.ru/api/v1

Files to check and modify:
- /Users/meteo/Documents/WWW/site-builder/.env.example (fix NUXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE value + add comment)
- /Users/meteo/Documents/WWW/site-builder/deploy/nginx/nginx.conf (verify only, no changes expected)
acceptance_criteria: nginx.conf /api/ location block verified to proxy to backend:8000
